feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Use of Custom CDS Entity YY1_PURCHASE Not Permitted in Development System
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use a custom business object created via the Custom Business Object and Custom CDS View Fiori apps. A table has been generated, and I am attempting to use the corresponding CDS entity YY1_PURCHASE in my development (RAP) scenario.

However, I am getting the error:
“The use of CDS Entity YY1_PURCHASE is not permitted.”

Is it possible to use such custom CDS entities created via key user tools in RAP development? Or is there any restriction in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Please let me know if this is supported or not.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error 'Invalid (navigation) property 'SAP__Messages' in $select of sap.ui.model.odata.v4
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have created a custom V4 Odata service based on RAP framework and could see that the preview is working fine. When Fiori team tried building the app on the top of this V4 service, error 'Invalid (navigation) property 'SAP__Messages' 
in $select of sap.ui.model.odata.v4.ODataContextBinding: /XXXX' is coming up. 

We have tried checking in backend but don't see any error logs in /IWFND/ERROR_LOGS.

Could anyone suggest what could be the possible rootcause of the issue.

Thanks.

entry.title: Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown in my system. Our eclipse version is Version: 2022-06 (4.24.0). Why Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown?

 

Advance Thanks

entry.title: rap preview with odata v4 works, with odata v2 does not
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have created a rap service on sap cloud trial account. Originally I've used odata v4. When I want to make preview, it shows all data as expected. When I switch to odata V2, it shows just a blank page. No error noticed in error log so far. Does anybody have similar experience? How to overcome this issue?

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

Radim

entry.title: Consuming API in RAP for Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using the Onpremise system where i have built RAP on top of this API for business partner.

In gateway test client service works fine and no issue in it.

I have built the class with required interface of RAP and when i run the class system goes 404 error.

Kindly suggest some idea on this. Thanks.

Issue is as below:

1. In the last statment of this code, when i debug the standard on the list of Entity set...I am not finding ENTITY as BUSINESS_PARTNER .

Am i missing anything on the below code ?

Service is already in active status.

I am not getting the response and it end up with error 404 .

cl_http_client=>create_by_destination( EXPORTING destination = 'NONE'

IMPORTING client = DATA(lo_http_client)

EXCEPTIONS argument_not_found = 1

destination_not_found = 2

destination_no_authority = 3

plugin_not_active = 4

OTHERS = 5 ).

 

 

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_client_proxy_fact=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZABC'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/' ).

 

" Navigate to the resource

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'BUSINESS_PARTNER' )->create_request_for_read( ).

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Trial: Service Definition and Binding Not Working newly Created Package
entry.content:
Hi SAP RAP Champion,

my package under ZLOCAL 



I attempted to create a Service Definition and Service Binding in the package ZFE_ATS_PR. However, when I preview the service binding, it displays a blank screen.

 

I created a similar Service Definition and Service Binding using the same CDS root entity (without creating a new CDS root) in another package, ZFE_TRAVEL_000405, which was generated by the class ZDMO_CL_FE_TRAVEL_GENERATOR(https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-rap-prepare-service..html), and it works as expected.

Additionally, when I run the newly created artifacts (Service Definition → Service Binding) in the package created by the autogenerated class, they work correctly. I also tried previewing the service binding from another user’s package, and it works fine there as well.

To troubleshoot further, I deleted my ABAP Cloud Trial cockpit account and recreated it, but the issue still persists. am missing any configuration, authorization, or package-related setting?

Your valuable suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,
Pradhan

entry.title: Can We Build Live Insights Using CDS Views and SAP Analytics Cloud Within 15 Days?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

My name is E Pranith Kumar, and I am a fresher. My team and I are eager to take up a meaningful challenge and deliver a strong outcome within a short timeline.

We are exploring the possibility of building live insights using CDS Views and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). I would like to understand:

  • Is it feasible to build live analytical insights using CDS Views and SAC within 15 days?
  • If yes, what are the key prerequisites (system setup, authorizations, versions, and connectivity)?
  • Which T-codes/tools are typically used for:
    • Creating and exposing CDS Views
    • Enabling live connectivity to SAC
    • Authorization and data access

We have been provided with a few use cases (attached below). Since we are new to this domain, your guidance would be extremely helpful:

  • Which use case would be best suited for a short timeline?
  • Which one offers the best feature scope and business impact?
  • What SAP modules are typically involved for the recommended use case?
  • What type of system access or roles would be required to implement it?

Additionally, if possible, could you please recommend any learning resources or documentation that would help us research, learn, and implement this effectively?

Although we are new to CDS Views and SAC, we are highly motivated and ready to put in the effort. With your guidance, we are confident we can deliver meaningful insights.

Thank you very much for your time and support. I truly appreciate any direction you can provide.

Best regards,
E Pranith Kumar

entry.title: Unable to get file picker in pop-up of RAP application
entry.content:
I want my pop-up to be able to pick a file from my desktop but I am not getting the option to do it.
Below is how the popup looks now, when I click upload excel it does go to my method in debugger.
So I think I am on right path.


I am using abstract entity to do this because I really do not want to add a field to my table which would hold the excel file.

@EndUserText.label: 'Upload Excel'
define abstract entity Z_S_ExcelUpload
{     
  @Semantics.largeObject: { 
      mimeType: 'MimeType', 
      contentDispositionPreference: #ATTACHMENT
  }
  @EndUserText.label: 'Excel File'     
  attachment : abap.rawstring;
  
  .hidden: true
  @Semantics.mimeType: true
  mimetype   : abap.char(128);
}

what am I doing wrong, how can I make it pick an excel file from my desktop?
Is this because I am using OData V2 – UI instead of V4?
Thanks.

entry.title: Parallel Deletion In RAP managed Application
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a RAP managed application with the following setup:

  • strict ( 2 )
  • with draft
  • List Report without Object Page
  • OData V4 / SAP Fiori Elements
  • delete ( precheck ) implemented

Scenario:

When two tabs are open simultaneously with the same list report:

  1. User deletes a record from Tab 1 → success message shown → record deleted
  2. Record still appears on Tab 2 (page not refreshed)
  3. User selects the same record on Tab 2 and presses Delete
  4. Instead of showing a custom error message, the UI shows a success message again

What I have implemented:

In precheck_delete I do a direct SELECT from the persistent table. If sy-subrc <> 0 (record not found), I populate failed and reported with a custom error message.

What I have confirmed in the debugger:

  • FAILED table is correctly populated 

     

  • REPORTED table is correctly populated with custom message 

     

  • MSGID and MSGNO are correct 

     

What I see in the network (F12):

The DELETE request returns HTTP 404 with:

 
 
json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "/IWBEP/CM_V4S_RUN/000",
    "message": "Unspecified provider error occurred"
  }
}

It seems the OData framework returns 404 before the precheck result is evaluated, completely bypassing my custom message.

Important note:

A colleague has a similar application without with draft — in his case precheck works perfectly, the delete is blocked and the custom message is shown correctly with HTTP 202 response.

My questions:

  1. Is this a known limitation of RAP with draft for the parallel delete scenario?
  2. Is there a way to intercept the 404 and surface the custom backend message?
  3. Would removing with draft be the correct solution given that draft is not actively used in our app?

Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Editing is disabled for this application

Kind regards

entry.title: RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Is there anyone who successfully used this BAdI [RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY]?
https://api.sap.com/badi/RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY 
API documentation show it is released for Developer Extensibility.
But when we try to use, we found this information.
"The standard implementation RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_S001 is already active. Therefore, from a framework perspective, it is not possible to create an additional custom implementation to replace or overwrite the existing standard logic.".
Also, we cannot change the logic in standard class too.
Class : CL_RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_EX
Error : You have no authorization in S_DEVELOP to switch off the Assistant for CL_RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_EX

We have S_DEVELOP authorization and still encountering same error.
Any advice please?

Regards,
May

entry.title: OData V4 Fiori Elements: "KeyPath missing at p.getItemFromContext" when selecting Value Help - Fiori
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am facing a persistent UI5 ERROR in an OData V4 Fiori Elements application (based on ABAP RAP).

The Scenario: I have a Root Consumption View with an input Parameter. I have assigned a custom CDS Value Help (Dropdown / #XS) to this parameter. The dropdown successfully opens and displays the data in the Fiori Preview.

The Error: When the user clicks/selects an item from the dropdown list, the slection doesn't happen with the following console error in the browser:

Uncaught (in promise) Error: KeyPath missing at p.getItemFromContext

1. Value Help CDS View (Single Key, Dropdown)

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help for Parameter'
@ObjectModel.resultSet.sizeCategory: #XS  

define view entity ZI_VH_CustomValue
  as select from custom_domain_table
{
      @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 10 }]
        key cast( domain_value as abap.char(1) ) as ValueKey,

      @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]
      @Semantics.text: true
      domain_text as Description
}
where active_status = 'A'

2. The Consumption View (Short Version)

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Main Business Object'
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true

define root view entity ZC_MainBusinessObject
  with parameters

    @EndUserText.label: 'Custom Filter Parameter'
    @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
        entity: { name: 'ZI_VH_CustomValue', element: 'ValueKey' },

        /* Explicit binding to pass the value back to the parameter */
        additionalBinding: [{
            localParameter: 'p_custom_filter',
            element: 'ValueKey',
            usage: #RESULT
        }]
    }]
    p_custom_filter : z_custom_data_element

  as select from ZI_MainBusinessObject
{
  key DocumentId,
      DocumentType,
      PostingDate
}
where PostingDate <= $session.system_date

My Questions:

  1. Is there a known limitation or missing @ui/ @Consumption annotation required to bind a Value Help strictly to a PARAMETER (rather than a standard table field) in OData V4?
  2. Why is the OData V4 framework failing to resolve the context for the selected item despite the explicit localParameter binding?

Any insights or workarounds would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Display Hierarchy in SAP RAP
entry.content:
ABAP Development  ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  #ABAPCloud

We are trying to create a UI app with

1. WBS hierarchy tree on first page.

2. On click of a selected WBS it would go to another page which has financial details in form of single table having multiple tab views.

Can anyone please help with any of these requirements? How can we use analytical cube and query to achieve this?

entry.title: R_SalesOrderTP extensibility
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud and we have extended the behavior of Manage Sales Order (Version 2) (BDEF: R_SalesOrderTP) to add a determination. However, adding a determination is not allowed as an extension in R_SalesOrderTP.

We also explored using event-based local consumption, but we are not allowed to modify the Sales Order entity in that context.

The requirement is to automatically set a Delivery Block when certain standard fields are changed.

Given these limitations, is there an alternative approach to achieve this requirement?

Thank you

entry.title: How to access custom VBAK fields in BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE?
entry.content:
I created custom VBAK fields in Custom Fields app. Now, I'm trying to access it on BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE to manipulate its values.
Is this possible?

Is it not present in BAPE_VBAK.

entry.title: SAP RAP: Integration of custom entity in non custom entity based CDS composition tree as facet
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question with regards to a RAP based FIORI object page.

I have a problem to use/integrate a CDS custom entity in a "normal" RAP Object page. With "normal" I mean a RAP application, based on a CDS composition tree WITHOUT custom entities (classic parent-child composition).

My RAP artifacts:

- CDS Interface view header data
- CDS Interface view child data (connected via composition relation)
- Other CDS for Search helps
- Composition view for Header data (Root)
- Composition view for child data (dependend)
- Meta-Data Extension to composition root-view 
- Meta-Data Extension to child view
- Behavior definition for interface CDS
- Behavior Definition for consumption/projection
- Service-Definition
- Service-Binding OdataV4
- Custom Entity with Parameter + ABAP class is formerly defined

So my application IS NOT A COMPOSITION TREE OF CUSTOM ENTITIES !

RAP application is starting. Single list record could be selected, go into Detail. Detail shows header data + separate facet for child related data in UI LINEITEM_REFERENCE.

Somehow I'm failing integrating the custom entity into the "classic" composition tree. Target is a new facet, showing result
data of custom entity as a listing in a facet (like child data). Maybe there is a lack of understanding on my side.

A problem beside is, that my custom entity needs a parameter to select data for a specific (the just in RAP UI selected)
object.

Does someone has this achived and maybe some example code for
- Integration of custom entity into non-custom entity CDS tree, both for interface and consumption
- Delivering the parameter to custom entity using actual RAP detail data?

Thanks in advance.
Klaus

entry.title: Extend RAP based app - Manage sales quotation version 2 app
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

My goal is to add the standard fields VBAK-KVGR1 and VBAK-KVGR2 to the Manage Sales Quotation (Version 2) app, specifically in the filter bar and the report output.

I initially attempted this via Key User Extensibility, but since this is a RAP-based application, the Custom Fields and Logic (data source extension) approach does not seem to be applicable.

I then proceeded with Developer Extensibility (even though cloud extensibility is marked as 'No') by extending the underlying projection view R_SalesQuotationTP, which is used by the main consumption view C_SalesQuotationManageTP. The required fields (KVGR1, KVGR2) are currently visible in R_SalesQuotationTP, but they are not propagated to C_SalesQuotationManageTP.

I am unable to extend C_SalesQuotationManageTP further, as it is a projection view and adding associations is not permitted at this layer.

Additionally, I created a metadata extension to expose these fields as selection fields on the UI. However, the new fields are still not appearing in the application.

I would like to understand:

  • Am I missing any steps in making these fields available end-to-end?
  • Is there any required step to refresh or regenerate the service binding / metadata beyond cache invalidation (which I have already performed)?
  • What is the recommended approach to extend this standard RAP application with these standard fields?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: How to use BAPE_SDSALESDOCITEM to update custom VBAP fields?
entry.content:
Goal: Update the sales order from the reference document when reference document is updated.
Context: Sales Order is created using "Create with reference". Tried to debug this an found no error but I think I was not mapping it to proper line item. 

Additionally, the values of IT_CONTRACT_VBAP comes from other METHOD that select custom fields from VBAP.

This the how the BUILD_ITEM_EXTENSION is called:

BUILD_ITEM_EXTENSION(
EXPORTING
IV_SO_VBELN = IV_SO_VBELN
IV_CONTRACT_VBELN = IV_CONTRACT_VBELN
IV_CONTRACT_VBAP = IT_CONTRACT_VBAP
IMPORTING
ET_EXTENSION = LT_ITEM_EXT ).

DATA: lo_bapi_mapping TYPE REF TO if_cfd_bapi_mapping.

TYPES BEGIN OF ty_so_ref, vgbel TYPE vbap-vgbel, vgpos TYPE vbap-vgpos, posnr TYPE vbap-posnr, END OF ty_so_ref.

DATA lt_so_ref TYPE HASHED TABLE OF ty_so_ref WITH UNIQUE KEY vgbel vgpos.

CLEAR: et_extensionin.

SELECT vgbel, vgpos, posnr FROM VBAP WHERE VBELN = _so_vbeln AND uepos =  AND vgbel <>  AND vgpos <>  INTO TABLE (lt_so_vbap).

LOOP AT LT_SO_VBAP ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<LFS_SO_VBAP>).
 INSERT VALUE ty_so_ref( vgbel = <lfs_so_vbap>-vgbel vgpos = <lfs_so_vbap>-vgpos posnr = <lfs_so_vbap>-posnr ) INTO TABLE lt_so_ref. ENDLOOP.

lo_bapi_mapping = cl_fd_bapi_mapping=>get_instance( ).

LOOP AT it_contract_vbap ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_contract_item>).

DATA(lv_contract_vbeln) = <lfs_contract_item>-vbeln.
DATA(lv_contract_posnr) = CONV vbap-vgpos( |{ <lfs_contract_item>-posnr ALPHA = IN } | ).

TRY.
 DATA(ls_so_ref) = lt_so_ref[ vgbel = lv_contrat_vbeln vgpos = lv_contract_posnr ].
 CATCH cx_sy_itab_line_not_found.
  CONTINUE.
ENDTRY.
ENDLOOP.

DATA(ls_item_ext) = VALUE bape_sdsalesdocitem( 
 key = CONV sdsalesdoc_key( iv_so_vbeln )
).

ls_item_ext-data-z_field_A = <lfs_contract_item>-z_field_A.
ls_item_ext-data-z_field_B = <lfs_contract_item>-z_field_B.

ls_item_ext-datax-z_field_A_ = abap_true.
ls_item_ext-datax-z_field_B = abap_true.

TRY.
 lo_bapi_mapping->map_to_bapiparex_single(
 EXPORTING
  ir_source_structure = REF #( ls_item_ext )
 CHANGING
  ct_bapiparex = et_extensionin
 CATCH cx_cfd_bapi_mapping.
  CONTINUE.
 ENDTRY.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: How to update Virtual Element field in list report from action button c
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a custom Fiori application , in Projection view there is a virtual element added which is a qty field . The requirment is to update the virtual field for the selected records in the fiori application on a button click through RAP action.The qty field should be calculated for user on click and show the value temporarily in the new virtual column in the list report. Kindly guide on how this can be achieved ,in ABAP class of the virtual field the global variables set inside the behaviour class is not available or getting cleared.

Regards

Niranjan

entry.title: RAP Draft: Side Effects for Associated Text Fields not reflecting in UI (Fiori Elements OData V4)
entry.content:
What I'm trying to achieve ? 

When the user types or selects a new VehicleNumber on the Create/Edit screen:

  1. A backend determination finds the corresponding DriverID.

  2. The UI automatically refreshes the DriverID, DriverName, and DriverMobile fields on the screen.

What I have implemented ?

1. Behvaior definition : Defined the side effects to trigger a refresh of all three fields when the vehicle field changes.

// Side effects
  side effects {
    field VehicleNumber
      affects field DriverID, 
              field DriverName, 
              field DriverMobile;
  }

  determination FillDriverDetails on modify { field VehicleNumber; }

2. Determination Logic 'FillDriverDetails' : Initially, I only updated the DriverID, expecting the SADL engine to perform the join and fetch the name/mobile during the subsequent read.

" Reading master data for the vehicle to take the assigned the DriverID
  
  MODIFY ENTITIES OF ZI_TripHeader IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY TripHeader
    UPDATE FIELDS ( DriverID )
    WITH VALUE #( ( %tky     = <ls_trips>-%tky
                    DriverID = ls_driver-d_id ) ).

3. The Netwrok behaviour: When changing the Vehicle Number in UI, the side effects work perfectly on the frontend.
        a. UI sends a PATCH with the new VehicleNumber.
        b. UI immediately sends a GET request explicitly asking for DriverID, DriverName and DriverMobile ($select=DriverMobile,DriverName)

The Problem : The DriverID is getting updated with the new value in the UI. But, the Driver Name and Mobile number fields are getting the old value (value previously available or empty) and the UI is not reflecting the change. 

To my perspective, the side effect is working as expected. But the framework is not resolving the associated field values of Driver CDS view.

  • UI: SAP Fiori Elements (OData V4)

  • Entities: ZI_TripHeader (Root) with associations to ZI_Vehicle and ZI_Driver and a composition relationship for ZI_TripIncidents.

  • DriverName and DriverMobile are read-only fields in the root view, pulled via association (_Driver.FullName, _Driver.Mobile).

Below is the CDS view entities.
1. ZI_TripHeader (root Entity)

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Root entity for Trip transaction'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define root view entity ZI_TripHeader
  as select from ztab_tripheader
  composition [0..*] of ZI_TripIncident as _Incident
  association [1] to zi_driver          as _Driver  on $projection.DriverID = _Driver.DriverId
  association [1] to ZI_Vehicle         as _Vehicle on $projection.VehicleNumber = _Vehicle.VehicleRegNumber
  association [1] to ZI_LoadTypeVH as _LoadTypeVH on $projection.LoadType = _LoadTypeVH.LoadType
{
  key t_tripid              as TripID,
      t_cdate               as TripDate,
      t_vno                 as VehicleNumber,
      t_driverid            as DriverID,
      t_source              as StartPlace,
      t_destination         as EndPlace,
      
      t_loadtype            as LoadType,
      t_status              as TripStatus,
      t_tot_exp             as TripTotalExpense,
      
      @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
      created_by            as CreatedBy,
      
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
      created_at            as CreateAt,
      
      @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
      last_changed_by       as LastChangedBy,
      
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
      last_changed_at       as LastChangedAt,
      
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
      local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt,

      // ---> below two associated fields are not resolved for UI Refresh
      _Driver.FullName      as DriverName,
      _Driver.Mobile        as DriverMobile,
      
      _LoadTypeVH.Description as LoadDescription,

      // Make association public
      _Incident,
      _Driver,
      _Vehicle,
      _LoadTypeVH
}

2. ZI_Driver (associated entity)

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Interface view for driver'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Search.searchable: true
define root view entity zi_driver
  as select from ztab_driver
{
      @EndUserText.label: 'ID'
  key d_id        as DriverId,
  
      @EndUserText.label: 'Name'
      @search.defaultSearchElement: true
      d_full_name as FullName,    // this one
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Phone'
      d_mobile    as Mobile,      // this one
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Emergency'
      d_emobile   as Emergencymobile,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'License'
      d_license   as DrivingLicense,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Expiry'
      d_lexpiry   as LicenseExpiry,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Govt.ID'
      d_govid     as GovernmentID,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Aadhar'
      d_aadhar    as AadharCard,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'PAN Card'
      d_pan       as PanCard,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Status'
      d_status    as DriverStatus
}

The Root and child entities are draft enabled. 

Am I missing anything important detail for the framework to resolve the values of associated fields ? I'm expecting experts inputs and opinions. Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,
M Boopalan

entry.title: Charts / KPI Visualization with RAP Custom Entities
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently working on a RAP application using custom entities, where both entities are implemented through the same ABAP class. The association between these entities is working as expected, and I have successfully handled filtering and paging as well.

At the moment, I can display the List Report, Object Page, and Line Item Reference navigation without any issues.

However, I would now like to enhance the main page by adding visualizations such as charts or KPI-style data representations based on the aggregated data.

I have explored several resources, but I haven’t been able to find a clear or reliable approach for achieving chart/KPI visualization directly using custom entities in RAP.

Is there any supported way or recommended approach to implement such visualizations in this scenario?

Any guidance or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
